title: AIOS Use-Reuse-Recycle Plastic Prosecco/Champagne Flutes. Capacity160ml (Pack of 10)
features: These Prosecco flutes are made from a single piece design which makes them sturdy enough to be washed and reused several times before being recycyled

Material: Crystal Polystyrene. Each glass carries the necessary EU Made of Plastic Markings. Brim Capacity: 160ml / 6oz, lined At: 100ml & 125ml. One piece construction so there is no need for clipping together of flute and base.
Can be cleaned by placing in top rack of the dishwasher or by handwashing avoiding use of abrasive pads that would cause scratches.

These are ideal for parties and events. Also popular for days out such as picnicking in the park, barbecues on the beach or taking camping. Much safer around hot tubs and pool areas where shattered or broken glass would be a problem.
Perfect for serving Prosecco, Champagne, Cava, Sparkling wines, Kir Royale, Buck's fizz and other drinks or cocktails where bubbles are a must.
